since_last: 55% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.36%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 55% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC +0.30% · Gold +0.30% · Nasdaq100 -1.87%. 55% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.36%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.36%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -0.71%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SAP is the standout at +5.96%
cards.body: Leaders: SAP +5.96%, NVT +5.66%, INTC +4.08%, NET +2.98%, ORCL +2.68%. Laggards: SKHY -2.19%, AMBA -1.80%, MU -1.74%, FIX -1.70%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.59% at $116.35
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.59% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
